14.reason: Error: When k=0, j is the current index, but m[j-1] accesses m[-1] which is out of bounds. Also, the initial value for the expansion is not set; it should start from s[i-1]+1.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  Error: When k=0, j is the current index, but m[j-1] accesses m[-1] which is out of bounds. Also, the initial value for the expansion is not set; it should start from s[i-1]+1.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  Error: When k=0, j may be 0, so m[j-1] accesses m[-1] which is out of bounds. Also, the initial value for expansion should be based on s[i-1], not m[j-1].
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Correct in principle but expansion incomplete: the last character s[i+1] is never copied to m, and after the loop the position j is not correctly set for subsequent characters.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Relies on m[j-1] which may be invalid when j=0 or expansion starts; should use s[i-1]+k+1 instead]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  Incorrectly derives next char from previous array element without condition checks; should use s[i-1] + k + 1.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.2 , reason:  When j=0, m[j-1] accesses invalid memory; relies on uninitialized m instead of s[i-1], causing undefined behavior.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Accesses m[j-1] when j could be 0 (e.g., if string starts with '-'), leading to undefined behavior; also fails to check character types and validity of expansion as per problem requirements]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Accesses m[j-1] without ensuring j > 0; also expands even when characters around '-' are not of same type or invalid, violating problem requirements]

10.reason: Missing validation of type and order: must check that both characters around '-' are of the same character class (lowercase, uppercase, digit) and that s[i-1] < s[i+1]; otherwise '-' should be copied unchanged.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Missing validation of type and order: must check that both characters around '-' are of the same character class (lowercase, uppercase, digit) and that s[i-1] < s[i+1]; otherwise '-' should be copied unchanged.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  Missing validation for character types and order; expansion should only occur if both sides are same type and right > left.

12.reason: Loop condition uses unchecked difference; fails for invalid cases (e.g., different types, left >= right) and does not include copying the final character s[i+1] after the loop.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Loop condition uses unchecked difference; fails for invalid cases (e.g., different types, left >= right) and does not include copying the final character s[i+1] after the loop.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  [No bounds check for s[i-1] and s[i+1]; no validation that characters are same type and s[i+1] > s[i-1]; non-expandable dash is ignored]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  Executes unconditionally without type/order checks; should be nested inside a conditional block.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.2 , reason:  Fails to check bounds, character types, or order as required; accessing s[i-1]/s[i+1] may cause out-of-bounds read.

17.reason: [Missing else clause for non-expandable dash; such dashes should be copied verbatim]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Missing else clause for non-expandable dash; such dashes should be copied verbatim]

24.reason: [m is not null-terminated, causing potential undefined behavior]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  [m is not null-terminated, causing potential undefined behavior]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.2 , reason:  Missing explicit null terminator '\0' at the end of m, which may cause puts to print garbage or crash.

18.reason: This branch only handles non-'-' chars; missing an else branch inside the '-' check to output '-' unchanged when expansion conditions fail.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  This branch only handles non-'-' chars; missing an else branch inside the '-' check to output '-' unchanged when expansion conditions fail.

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Using gets() is unsafe and deprecated; may cause compilation error with modern compilers due to removal from C11 standard]

7.reason: Declaring variables after a statement violates C89/C90 standard, leading to compilation error.
